notes: Deliberately-bad floor. Session-based: returns a URL and needs session management.
Use `command claude`, NOT `claude` — the nix-darwin fish wrapper injects --remote-control, which disables features. Reads local files via Bash.
Mid-tier, different provider. Top of the initial roster (ranks 1–3).
Ceiling. DEFERRED (decision 1): NOT in the initial roster. Added once the deterministic spine proves useful, to skip ceiling-validation cost up front.
